content.en:
Territorial sea boundary crack, in a fragmented cavern.

A Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor wearing blood armor was practicing in retreat here.

He is the master of the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor - the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor!

Suddenly.

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor opened his eyes.

"Grey Mist, that little guy contacted me. "

He accepted the message, and quickly looked surprised.

He didn't expect that such a demonic Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor would be born on the side of Wanlong's territorial waters, and after such a short period of cultivation, it would become a Blood Transformation Realm.

"According to the description of the gray mist, the Terran's gold liquid energy sea is in line with a substance-gold muscle fluid, but it is definitely not pure gold muscle liquid, it is estimated that it is a gold liquid energy sea refined from gold muscle liquid. "

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor also had a little understanding of the Golden Muscle Fluid, which was a substance that could be of great help to the Heavenly Ancestor of the Fusion Realm to impact the Blood Transformation Realm, and could also enhance the potential and foundation of a race.

As far as he knew, the Golden Muscle Fluid was mainly born in the territory of the Vajra Snake clan, and although a small number was also born in other parts of the territorial sea boundary seam, the number was too small to be found.

"That Endless Heavenly Ancestor should have found a new place where the Golden Muscle Fluid was born in the crack of the territorial sea boundary, it is impossible to obtain it from the Vajra Snake Territory, with his strength, he dares to go to the Vajra Snake to collect it, he will definitely die. "

"The fact that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor was able to break through so quickly and become a Blood Transformation Realm is definitely the credit of the Golden Muscle Fluid, otherwise it would be very difficult for a Boundary-Breaking Fusion Realm Heavenly Ancestor to become a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor. "

"The value of the Golden Muscle Fluid is not low, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is willing to refine the Golden Muscle Fluid into a sea of gold liquid energy, and he must have a lot of it. If I get those golden muscle fluids, I don't need to be able to trade them in the White Shadow Elephant Clan's territory!"

Thinking like this, the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor was ready to return to the Wanlong Territorial Sea.

The value of the golden muscle fluid was enough for him to venture back.

......

Time passed, and a long time passed.

this day.

In the shock current near the No. 2 node of Wanlong's territorial waters, a ship was swimming here, and soon came here.

Swish!

The ship disappeared, and a figure stood here, which was the Blood-robed Heavenly Ancestor.

"It's still the wooden god ship that I traded, it's fast, and it's not easy to get lost. "

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor sighed with emotion.

During this journey, he also encountered several dangers, but he successfully escaped with the help of the wooden god ship.

Now, he has finally returned to Wanlong's territorial waters.

Tear and pull!

The second node was torn apart by the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor, and he directly entered the Wanlong territorial waters.

Subsequently, he immediately contacted his apprentice, Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor.

Soon, the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor came.

"Master, you're finally back!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor was very excited.

"After so many years, you are still a Blood Transformation Realm cultivator!" said the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor after seeing it.

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor said embarrassedly: "Master, how can there be any good resources in the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea, it will be difficult to improve when you reach a Blood Transformation Realm!"

Immediately, he asked curiously, "Master, you should be the Third Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor now!"

"Hmm!" the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor said proudly: "Yes, when I left the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea, I was a Second Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and later I had a chance to reach the Third Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor. Moreover, my heart is not far from the fourth transformation, and I will be the fourth Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor at that time. "

"Congratulations, Master!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor congratulated.

"Don't talk about this, this time I'm here to solve the problem of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor!" the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor said, "If I didn't guess, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor has a lot of golden muscle fluid in his hands. When the time comes, those golden muscle fluids will belong to me, and when the time comes, you can take those golden liquid energy seas yourself. "

"What is Golden Muscle Fluid?"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor was curious.

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor explained: "It is a special substance in the Territorial Sea Boundary Gap, with the Golden Muscle Fluid, even if it is a Boundary Breaking Heavenly Ancestor, he can use him to make the heart transform, but it requires a large amount of Golden Muscle Fluid. An ordinary Heavenly Ancestor could use a small amount of Golden Muscle Fluid to transform his heart and become a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor. "

"Golden muscle fluid is so powerful!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor was really taken aback.

In the territorial waters of Wanlong, an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor needs to spend endless and long years to slowly survive before he can hope to transform his heart and thus transform into a Heavenly Ancestor.

He did the same at the beginning, and now the golden muscle fluid can make the Heavenly Ancestor quickly carry out blood transformation.

"There are really too many good things in the seams of territorial waters!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor sighed.

"There are a lot of good things in the territorial sea realm, but there is also a lot of danger!" said the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor: "Even if I have the strength of the Blood Transformation Realm three times, I will fall if I am not careful." It is said that not long ago, the migration of the primeval golden turtle clan in the gap between the territorial waters caused a huge wave, and tens of thousands of blood transformation realm creatures fell, and even a six-time blood transformation realm creature fell!"

"What, so many Blood Transformation Realm creatures have fallen!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor couldn't imagine how many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors there were in the entire Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea!

"Okay, let's not talk about that, give me all the information of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, as well as his location!" said the Blood-robed Heavenly Ancestor.

"Yes, Master!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor immediately handed over all the information about Ye Tian to the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor.

"Master, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor has a clone, and I'm not sure that his true body is in the Silent Black Sea!"

The meaning of the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor is very clear, don't directly enter the Silent Black Sea, in case the person's body is not in the Silent Black Sea, then slowly cultivate in the future, and then make a move when the strength is strong, the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor is not in trouble, he will be in trouble!

"Don't worry, I'm measured!"

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor said.

......

Silent Black Sea.

Since the last time there was an invasion of the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, he had transformed the Silent Black Sea again and arranged many powerful magic circles.

In this way, if a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor entered the Silent Black Sea, he would definitely not be able to hide it, and he would be discovered as soon as possible.

Even if a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor was close to the Infinite Realm Ruins near the Silent Black Sea, he could sense it in time.

"There is a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor approaching!"

Ye Tian sensed it.

Swish!

He appeared directly in the Silent Black Sea and intercepted this Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

This Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor was very unfamiliar, and he was not any Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor he knew.

But there are only a dozen Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the Ten Thousand Dragons' territorial waters, where did this Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor come from?

Moreover, the other party's aura is very powerful, and it is not an ordinary Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

"Three Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors!"

Ye Tian became extremely dignified at this moment.

If you fight here, the silent Black Sea will not be saved.
